title: One 2b Agent Handoff Payload
description: Canonical contract for all cross-agent invocations. Every calling agent must emit this. Every receiving agent validates it before proceeding.

trinity_identity.description: Identity this content belongs to. Must be explicit — never inferred.

request_origin.description: Who originated or is passing this request.

request_intent.description: Plain-English one-line description of what is being requested.

context_links.description: Paths to CEO Intel files relevant to this request. Empty array if none.

quarterly_thesis_ladder.description: Which Q2 2026 pillar this ladders to, or 'none — reactive' if it does not.

red_flag_check_status.description: Result of Fleet Router RED-flag pre-check. Receiving agent must halt if 'flagged'.

red_flag_notes.description: Required when red_flag_check_status is 'flagged'. Describes what triggered the flag.

route_to.description: Agent this payload is addressed to.

route_pattern.description: single = one agent handles end-to-end. sequential = output of first feeds next. parallel = requires Jason confirmation before fan-out.

downstream_agents.description: For sequential/parallel patterns: ordered list of agents to invoke after route_to completes.

surface_specs.description: Required when route_to is studio-design or studio-motion. Platform and format specs.

caller_state_snapshot.description: Optional. Relevant state from the calling agent (e.g. draft text being handed to Sentinel).
